attributes.description: ADR-0074 probe run verdict over time. red/yellow bands = orphans detected (halt condition orphans>0).
attributes.title: Joinability Outcome Over Time
attributes.visState: {"type": "area", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {"customLabel": "Probe runs"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "started_at", "interval": "auto", "min_doc_count": 1}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "group", "params": {"field": "outcome", "size": 5, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "1"}}], "params": {"addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right"}, "title": "Joinability Outcome Over Time"}

attributes.description: Join-success rate across runs: green = clean join, red/yellow = orphans, skipped = no sample.
attributes.title: Joinability Outcome Distribution
attributes.visState: {"type": "pie", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {"customLabel": "Probe runs"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "outcome", "size": 5, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "1"}}], "params": {"addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "isDonut": true}, "title": "Joinability Outcome Distribution"}

attributes.description: ADR-0074 halt condition (orphans > 0) at a glance: count of runs with outcome red or yellow.
attributes.title: Runs With Orphans Detected
attributes.visState: {"type": "metric", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {"customLabel": "Runs with orphans"}}], "params": {"addTooltip": true, "addLegend": false, "type": "metric", "metric": {"colorSchema": "Green to Red", "colorsRange": [{"from": 0, "to": 10000}], "style": {"fontSize": 60}}}, "title": "Runs With Orphans Detected"}

attributes.description: Probe operational health: mean run duration_ms over time.
attributes.title: Joinability Probe Duration Over Time
attributes.visState: {"type": "line", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "avg", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "duration_ms", "customLabel": "Avg duration (ms)"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "started_at", "interval": "auto", "min_doc_count": 1}}], "params": {"addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right"}, "title": "Joinability Probe Duration Over Time"}

attributes.description: ADR-0083 SLM health probe. reachable=false band = SLM unreachable. Uses boolean reachable (consistent across the status/error mapping straddle).
attributes.title: SLM Reachability Over Time
attributes.visState: {"type": "area", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {"customLabel": "Probes"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "probed_at", "interval": "auto", "min_doc_count": 1}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "group", "params": {"field": "reachable", "size": 3, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "1"}}], "params": {"addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right"}, "title": "SLM Reachability Over Time"}

attributes.description: Share of probes where the SLM was reachable (true) vs unreachable (false).
attributes.title: SLM Availability Split
attributes.visState: {"type": "pie", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {"customLabel": "Probes"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "reachable", "size": 3, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "1"}}], "params": {"addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "isDonut": true}, "title": "SLM Availability Split"}

attributes.description: Round-trip probe latency to the SLM tunnel: mean probe_latency_ms over time.
attributes.title: SLM Probe Latency Over Time
attributes.visState: {"type": "line", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "avg", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "probe_latency_ms", "customLabel": "Avg probe latency (ms)"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "probed_at", "interval": "auto", "min_doc_count": 1}}], "params": {"addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right"}, "title": "SLM Probe Latency Over Time"}

attributes.description: Recent probes where the SLM was unreachable. status/error shown from _source (straddle-safe: status/error mappings differ across indices, so they are not aggregated).
attributes.title: Recent Unreachable SLM Probes

attributes.description: L0 monitors substrate: joinability probe (ADR-0074) + SLM health probe (ADR-0083/FRE-399). FRE-538. Per-substrate nested orphan/check breakdown deferred (legacy aggs cannot aggregate nested fields).
attributes.title: Monitors — Joinability & SLM Health
